headline: Clarity-first support for founder-led service businesses who are tired of vague promises.
subheadline: We use a structured commercial clarity sprint that turns real buyer language into a clear market narrative so buyers understand the work before they are asked to trust the result.
proof_points: The buyer wants proof, examples and a transparent mechanism because they have already wasted money on agencies.
"Show me the process, not just the promise."
objection_handlers: A founder says agencies sound polished but never explain the service clearly enough for buyers to trust it.
"I do not want another agency that hides behind reports."
